extraction.one_line_summary: EWAN Caleb won a headwind sprint after breakaway caught inside 15km, attacking early from the final right-hander with 1.5km remaining.
tactical_patterns: Block headwind within final 15km prevented late breakaway survival despite modest five-minute maximum gap throughout stage.
EWAN launched sprint early from sharp right-hander at 1.5km out, suggesting tight corners favor pre-positioning over pure speed.
EOLO attacks before finale were marked by GC teams despite sprint setup, revealing nervous peloton control on transition stages.

rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: positive: 50th career win shows ability to time sprint from technical corners, not just pure leadouts
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: neutral: hunting maglia ciclamino points at intermediate sprints rather than contesting stage finish
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: negative: suffered mechanical inside final kilometers on flat transition stage, poor positioning or equipment issues
